title: FAMILY RESOURCE NAVIGATION - 211info
text: ESTACADA MIDDLE SCHOOL FAMILY RESOURCE NAVIGATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists families in navigating local, school, county, and state resources. Works to identify services that meet the immediate needs of the referred family and find the supports that match those needs. Services include family advocacy, interpretation services, information and referral, clothing and school supplies, transportation, connection to health and food resources, assistance with developmental screenings, diaper assistance, housing and shelter assistance, parent education and family support, and employment specialists. 500 NE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-6 Hours: By appointment Email (503) 997-1910 - -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main Phone (503) 997-1910 Family Resource Advocate-Spanish Yesteni Gonzalez [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, email, or visit website for more information. Referral form can be accessed on the website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eagle Creek and Estacada Services: School Based Integrated Services Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MIDDLE SCHOOL PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ESTACADA MIDDLE SCHOOL
